behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file, both class names, the method name, the accuracy_threshold attribute, and the 0.69 threshold requirement.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and constraints (threshold ≤ 0.69, accept equal values) without naming the specific assertGreaterEqual method or giving exact code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert threshold == 0.69 exactly (test_accuracy_threshold_v1/v2) and require assertGreaterEqual specifically, but instruction says threshold must be 'no higher than 0.69' — a valid fix using 0.68 or using assertGreater with 0.68 would fail tests.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute subprocess to run assertion logic (test_assertion_logic_at_threshold) and parse AST to verify structural changes.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify the actual threshold value changed from 0.7 to 0.69 and assertion method changed to assertGreaterEqual — a stub cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both V1 and V2 threshold values and assertion method changes are tested, matching the instruction's requirements.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped into Gates, Fail-to-pass, and Pass-to-pass sections with descriptive docstrings and comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: No typos detected in paths, class names, or commands.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the file and class/method names but doesn't name exact line numbers or give the literal replacement code.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
